This method of purchase has the advantage of saving the Purchaser the 7% Transfer Tax in Spain. The company can be purchased using a UK Sale and Purchase Agreement and the legal transaction can be handled by the Purchasers UK Lawyers. The company will be sold to the Purchaser fully warranted, unlike a property purchase in Spain via a Spanish Notary which carries no warranty.
